--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local D={"\066\106\081\043\100\047\079\057\066\081\061\061","\085\070\074\099\118\082\085\110\077\113\108\069\072\085\074\099\084\081\061\061","\084\097\075\110\101\077\108\112","";"\077\068\118\090\101\105\070\074\098\070\043\080\066\056\085\105";"\084\104\085\089\122\097\100\043","\114\104\056\097\102\097\100\073\075\082\070\043\075\049\075\050\085\081\061\061","\098\109\056\086\100\068\075\052\109\082\056\080\118\087\068\061","\122\111\113\061","\084\097\102\106\065\068\102\056\100\068\054\099\114\070\054\116\098\081\061\061","\084\104\056\115\100\082\076\089";"\100\097\098\070\072\081\061\061","\085\082\108\052\071\104\085\106\071\090\076\072\109\077\051\070";"\085\097\102\090\071\085\074\054\109\070\043\089\109\112\043\071\085\119\061\061","\050\070\076\057\122\104\075\043\065\119\061\061","\071\085\074\120\075\109\074\086\071\049\075\115\075\109\108\077\102\090\084\061";"\085\082\056\089\084\082\085\110\053\113\075\043\102\082\085\049\102\082\085\068\053\069\061\061","\100\104\051\052\122\097\053\061","\114\104\075\101\101\082\057\097\071\082\051\118\075\049\118\061","\050\070\076\089\100\050\075\054\102\082\056\106\122\082\109\061","\100\090\056\089\100\069\061\061","\114\120\075\105\084\113\102\043\102\119\061\061";"\085\085\056\120\077\049\075\070\069\090\081\090\101\056\056\074\069\105\105\061","\100\114\078\119\097\079\081\084\109\047\083\086\067\072\051\108\072\102\100\103\075\073\057\047\076\079\111\114\122\101\111\110\099\117\077\088\104\055\075\104\077\084\071\078\106\076\107\084\101\055\050\109\065\043\075\105";"\122\111\053\061","\050\070\076\112\072\103\061\061";"\072\090\076\115\072\090\056\105";"\102\082\076\087\102\120\074\057\122\104\084\061","\084\090\085\105\122\077\085\105\072\050\075\054\072\104\051\043";"\066\081\061\061";"\100\090\070\054\102\082\098\079";"\072\112\043\105\100\069\061\061";"\075\077\076\057\084\049\043\116\077\081\061\061","\122\082\085\115","\072\090\054\054\084\081\061\061","\100\050\074\110\122\097\053\061","\102\082\056\106
